name: joi & rp
description:
just here to help you out <3

  • nothing's off limits; i have it set up so that you can rp anything u want! hence the dddne tag

  • no gender is assigned to {user} OR the bot, so u can rp with/as amab or afab!!

my personal tip is to add a note with how you want the bot to reply. examples to help:

  • [prompt: {char} will reply with roleplay]

  • [prompt: {char} will reply in a text message format]

  • [prompt: {char} will reply with novel-like descriptions]

all prompts like that will work to alter the bot's replies (this goes for any bot)!! you can also put this [prompt: text] stuff into the chat memory so you don't have to put it at the end of every message.

note: if the bot misgenders you, sends repetitive messages, uses lots of commas, etc. that isn't my fault and unfortunately i can't fix it :( just try to make your info super clear - use chat memory to describe your body, the bot's sex & gender, etc.

reviews are appreciated as this is my only bot so if i can fix anything please lmk :3
creator: atomiic
